notion_api_key.title: Notion API Key
notion_api_key.description: Your Notion integration API key (starts with ntn_)

notion_database_id.title: Notion Database ID
notion_database_id.description: The ID of your Event Tracker database in Notion

apify_token.title: Apify API Token
apify_token.description: Your Apify API token — needed to re-scrape expired CDN URLs

supabase_key.title: Supabase Service Role Key
supabase_key.description: Your Supabase service_role key (found in Settings > API)
